name: oysterworkflow
description: Run revisioned OysterWorkflow workflows with Codex apps and tools.

interface.longDescription: Search workflows recorded, generated, and managed in OysterWorkflow, pin a canonical workflow revision, and let Codex execute one validated node at a time with the apps and tools already available in Codex.
defaultPrompt: 用 OysterWorkflow 执行‘筛选销售询盘并准备回复’
